MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2014 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Proceedings
Off Calendar Jun-26-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Tarkoff, Esq., 510.590.9500, for plaintiff Lithium Technologies.
Chris Baker, Esq., 415.433.1064, for defendant Leah Grotsky.

RULING: Matter argued. After a brief recess, counsel for defendant requests that DEFENDANT LEAH GROSKY'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Court Proceedings be taken off calendar without prejudice- matter has settled. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
